name: Deploy GPS Tracker to VPS

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main  # Make sure this matches your default branch name (main or master)

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Connect via SSH and deploy
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.VPS_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.VPS_USERNAME }}
          key: ${{ secrets.VPS_SSH_KEY }}
          script: |
            # Navigate to the exact folder on your VPS
            cd /root/gpstracker/gpstracker
            
            # Pull the latest code from GitHub
            git pull origin main
            
            # --- ADD YOUR APP RESTART COMMANDS BELOW ---
            # If your GPS tracker app has a backend that needs to be restarted 
            # to see the changes, uncomment and edit the appropriate line below:
            
            # systemctl restart traccar
            # pm2 restart gpstracker
            # npm install && npm run build
